member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationLoader
member.summary: Passes information from Configuration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationLoader.CreateConfigurationValues(Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ConfigurationFile,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: Access token to the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a configuration object from the file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.Scanout
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the scanout chain.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.Iscan
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the iscan chain.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.Lfsr
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the LFSR.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.DrPaddedBitsShifts
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of dummy DR bits required based upon TAP architecture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.CtvPaddedBits
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of dummy CTV bits used during chain captures. The template will “pad” CTVs with additional dummy captures at the start and end of each scanout, iscan, and lfsr capture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ChainLengths.Mclk
member.summary: Gets or sets the lenth of the internal register that stores the MCLK cycles and is needed to properly program the TAP to stop the SBFT test. .

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.CharacterMap.One
member.summary: Gets or sets the instruction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.CharacterMap.Zero
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.Fub.Bitpos
member.summary: Gets or sets the position within the LFSR of the fub signature.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.Fub.Partition
member.summary: Gets or sets the “cluster” name within IA Architecure.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.Fub.Fubname
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the unique fub within the partition corresponding the signature bitpos and partition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.Fubs.SegmentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the Length of each FUB’s LFSR signature used during LFSR capture. .

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.Fubs.Priority
member.summary: Gets or sets the priority ordering of the FUB partitions that determines which partition is data logged when more than one fails.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.HFPins.Tms
member.summary: Gets or sets the instruction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.HFPins.Tdi
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.HFRegister.Ir
member.summary: Gets or sets the instruction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.HFRegister.Dr
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction register pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapLink.Header
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapLink.Footer
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapLink.CharacterMap
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapPins.Tms
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapPins.Tdi
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Design.ConfigurationFile.Structures.TapPins.Tck
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pin names of the TAP signals from the pindef file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerDesignTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration file path.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationLoader
member.summary: Passes information from Configuration Files objects to Shared Storage structures.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.ConfigurationLoader.CreateConfigurationValues(Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Structures.ConfigurationFile,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.param: Access token to the shared storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Parser.ParseFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a configuration object from the file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Storage.DataStream.Lot
member.summary: Gets or sets the lot to hold the lot number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Storage.DataStream.Wafer
member.summary: Gets or sets the Wafer to hold wafer number.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Storage.DataStream.XLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the XLocation to hold X axis location.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.Execute.ConfigurationFile.Storage.DataStream.YLocation
member.summary: Gets or sets the YLocation to hold Y axis location.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.FileHandler
member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IOs operations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.IFileHandler
member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.IFileHandler.CreateFile(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.IFileHandler.CreateDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.IFileHandler.WriteToFile(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.DieIdName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name Die Id name, use when data are taken from share storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration file path.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.DesignSettingsName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Configuration file path.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the IO operations file handler.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.SbftLogger.PrimeSbftLoggerExecuteTestMethod.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the IO operations file handler.
